mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO pay_application_basis ( id, tenant_id, pay_application_id, basis_type, basis_id, basis_amount, created_by, updated_by, deleted_flag, remark ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.tenantId}, #{item.payApplicationId}, #{item.basisType}, #{item.basisId}, #{item.basisAmount}, #{item.createdBy}, #{item.updatedBy}, 0, #{item.remark} )
